title: Update private event pricing (2hr → $650, 3hr → $800)

requirements.text: In the PrivateEvents component, update the 2-hour rental price to $650 and the 3-hour rental price to $800 for all displayed pricing cards (weekday and/or weekend as applicable).

quotes: change 2 hours price for private event to $650 and $800 for 3 hours.

acceptanceCriteria: The 2-hour private event rental price displays as $650 in the PrivateEvents section.
The 3-hour private event rental price displays as $800 in the PrivateEvents section.
No other pricing values in the PrivateEvents section are changed.
The pricing cards render correctly on both desktop and mobile layouts.

constraints: Only update the private event pricing values in PrivateEvents.tsx — do not modify any other pricing sections (DailyAdmission, BirthdayPackages, GroupDiscounts, etc.).
nonGoals: Changing any other pricing tiers or sections.
Backend changes — pricing is static/hardcoded in the frontend component.
